runs.label: Track Night
runs.workout:
1mi warmup at 6:30pm (arrive earlier for longer warmup)
6:40pm we begin intervals
3 sets of 2x800 (400m/3min recovery), 1x400 (200m/90s recovery)
1mi cooldown

Modified:
3 sets 1x800 (400m/3min recovery), 2x400 (200m/90s recovery)
